mapper.insert:
/* 예측사용량 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_predict_usage ( site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, pre_usg_val, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.deviceId}, #{entity.stdTimestamp}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.preUsgVal}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: /* 마지막 예측사용량 상세조회 */ SELECT pre_usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, pre_usg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_predict_usage WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY std_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
/* 예측사용량 상세조회 */ SELECT pre_usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, pre_usg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_predict_usage WHERE pre_usg_idx = #{id}

/* 예측사용량 목록조회 */ SELECT pre_usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, pre_usg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_predict_usage
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}

/* 사용량 목록조회 ByDeviceId */ SELECT pre_usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, pre_usg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_predict_usage WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND std_timestamp BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end} ORDER BY std_timestamp
